Scenario_Name: Daily 10:00 run sends round-2 SMS to exactly-N-day cohort with round-1 linkage
Preconditions: Round-1 sent 20d ago; ORD Inforce; valid phone; not DNC; LINE=E02 & APP=E02
Expected_Result: SMS sent to current phone; message has name/reward/link (no ${var}); per-policy row 'S' with sms_sent_date=today and a round-1 reference ID

Scenario_Name: Changed DATE_COUNT applied without code change
Preconditions: Config N changed 20->15; round-1 sent 15d ago
Expected_Result: Customer selected using N=15; no deployment needed

Scenario_Name: Cohort day boundary excludes off-by-one days
Expected_Result: Only N=20 included; N-1 and N+1 excluded

Scenario_Name: Empty reference round-1 day ends round normally
Expected_Result: Zero targets; normal completion; no failure email

Scenario_Name: Inforce inclusion IND '2' and GOV '3'
Expected_Result: Both included

Scenario_Name: Lapsed policy excluded
Expected_Result: Excluded; no SMS

Scenario_Name: ORD status boundary '2' excluded
Expected_Result: Excluded (ORD Inforce is '1' only)

Scenario_Name: mobile1 used as primary
Expected_Result: SMS sent to mobile1

Scenario_Name: mobile2 fallback
Expected_Result: SMS sent to mobile2

Scenario_Name: No usable phone excluded
Expected_Result: Excluded; no SMS

Scenario_Name: Phone changed since round 1 uses current and logs actual
Expected_Result: Send to current phone; history logs phone used

Scenario_Name: Do Not Contact ORD remark '1' excluded
Expected_Result: Excluded; no SMS

Scenario_Name: Do Not Contact IND/GOV/PA remark '4' excluded
Expected_Result: Excluded; no SMS

Scenario_Name: cardNo not found skip and log 'F'
Expected_Result: Skip; row 'F' with NULL send date; round continues

Scenario_Name: Send rule a registered on neither channel
Expected_Result: SMS sent

Scenario_Name: Send rule b LINE blocked and no App
Expected_Result: SMS sent

Scenario_Name: Exclude App already registered
Expected_Result: No SMS

Scenario_Name: Exclude LINE registered and not blocked
Expected_Result: No SMS

Scenario_Name: App registered after filter still sent
Preconditions: passes filter then registers before send
Expected_Result: Still sent (status checked at process time only)

Scenario_Name: E13 error skip 'F' and continue
Expected_Result: Skip; 'F' NULL date; no retry; continue

Scenario_Name: Out-of-condition result skip 'F'
Expected_Result: Skip; 'F' NULL date

Scenario_Name: Registration service down retry<=3 then stop and email
Expected_Result: Retry <=3 spaced; stop round; failure email

Scenario_Name: Cross-round dedup no resend
Expected_Result: No duplicate SMS

Scenario_Name: One SMS per customer with multiple policies deterministic pick
Preconditions: same customer 3 qualifying policies one round
Expected_Result: Exactly 1 SMS; oldest then min policy_no; others logged

Scenario_Name: Prior 'F' record does not block resend
Preconditions: 'F' row with NULL send date exists
Expected_Result: Send proceeds; dedup counts NOT NULL only

Scenario_Name: Template 111 and full variable substitution
Expected_Result: var1/var2/var3 filled; no ${var} remains

Scenario_Name: Template 111 missing fallback to main type table
Expected_Result: Uses main message-type table format

Scenario_Name: Empty insured name skip 'F' never send nameless
Expected_Result: Skip; 'F'; no message sent

Scenario_Name: No active config stop whole round and email
Preconditions: run day has no active config
Expected_Result: Whole round stopped; failure email

Scenario_Name: CSV/formula injection in name neutralized
Expected_Result: CSV-safe (formula neutralized; commas quoted); no formula exec; no ${var} leak

Scenario_Name: Unicode/emoji/long name renders intact
Expected_Result: No mojibake; no CSV row corruption or split

Scenario_Name: CSV UTF-8 filename convention and ESB delivery
Expected_Result: UTF-8; name MKT_CSMS_MKTWelcomeNewCustApp_[YYMMDDhhmmss] BE year; via ESB->Gateway

Scenario_Name: File creation failure raises email
Expected_Result: Failure email naming the failed step

Scenario_Name: Two-level log with refer_no and type map
Expected_Result: campaign + per-policy rows; refer_no + status; O->ORD/I->IND/G->GOV/P->PA

Scenario_Name: Round-1 linkage on every sent row
Expected_Result: Each per-policy row has a round-1 reference ID

Scenario_Name: Status and date semantics dedup source
Expected_Result: 'S'+date / 'F'+NULL; dedup reads NOT NULL

Scenario_Name: Gateway per-record failure logged 'F' NULL
Preconditions: gateway returns failure for a record
Expected_Result: 'F' with NULL date; Manual Fix can re-pick

Scenario_Name: Round failure email to IT and User within 15 min
Expected_Result: Email to IT Dev + User; batch + failed step named; within 15 min

Scenario_Name: Manual Fix reprocesses failed day without resending successes
Preconditions: a whole daily round previously failed
Steps: IT Admin selects date and triggers Manual Fix
Expected_Result: Pending processed and sent; successful records untouched

Scenario_Name: Manual Fix mixed range sends only pending
Preconditions: range has sent and pending records
Expected_Result: Only pending sent; no duplicate

Scenario_Name: Daily round never auto-retries 'F'
Expected_Result: 'F' records not auto-retried; only Manual Fix picks them

Scenario_Name: Manual Fix date interpretation uses current N
Expected_Result: cohort = round-1 sent date D-20 (current N; no config history)

Scenario_Name: Concurrent Manual Fix and daily batch no double send
Expected_Result: Customer receives at most one SMS

Scenario_Name: Central reconcile report counts and type breakdown
Expected_Result: processed/S/F/excluded-by-reason + ORD/IND/GOV/PA breakdown; no separate threshold alert
Notes: FR-020.2 merged - reporting has no own FR (see coverage)

Scenario_Name: Mid-campaign N change handled by dedup and Manual Fix
Expected_Result: dedup blocks doubles; skipped cohorts recoverable via Manual Fix

Scenario_Name: Failure email and reconcile report clear and actionable
Expected_Result: correct IT+User recipients; failed step clear/actionable; counts legible
